notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ramón Laureano.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds out, third baseman Manny Machado to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Gavin Sheets out at 1st.
